# cairn skill install

Install the Cairn skill bundle into the harness skill directory (§18.d)

## Help

```text
Install the Cairn skill bundle into the harness skill directory (§18.d)

Usage: install [OPTIONS] --harness <HARNESS>

Options:
      --harness <HARNESS>
          Target harness (claude-code, codex, gemini, opencode, cursor, custom)

          Possible values:
          - claude-code: Claude Code harness — registers the skill via CLAUDE.md
          - codex:       Codex harness — registers the skill via AGENTS.md
          - gemini:      Gemini CLI harness — registers the skill via GEMINI.md
          - opencode:    `OpenCode` harness — registers the skill via the opencode config skills
            path
          - cursor:      Cursor harness — registers the skill via .cursorrules
          - custom:      Custom or unknown harness — prints a generic registration hint

      --target-dir <PATH>
          Override the default install path (~/.cairn/skills/cairn/)

      --force
          Overwrite generated files even if the version matches

      --json
          Emit JSON receipt instead of human-readable output

  -h, --help
          Print help (see a summary with '-h')
```
